channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bikes in middle of road causing obstruction to road traffic and in residents parking bay. Please remove asap, 18th June
item.description:
Bikes in middle of road causing obstruction to road traffic and in residents parking bay. Please remove asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ainger Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No LTN enforcement, 18th June
item.description:
Cars are going through at high speeds. And not even stopping at zebra crossing. Please please turn the enforcement cameras on
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eleanor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car dumped to advertise cars for sale, 18th June
item.description:
This is the same company but a different car. Been there a long time. No number plate on the front
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Vehicles for sale on the public road

item.description:
Bloody tyres innit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northstead Road, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Dog fool, 18th June
item.description:
In the street again our building wall. Please do something

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown and dead trees surrounding properties, 18th June
item.description:
Area of land to the left of 10 Broad Oak Close which is council land is overgrown which needs cutting back and fly tipped rubbish cleared. There are 4 trees which require inspection as one appears to be dead. There are also several trees behind the houses 6-10 Broad Oak Close. Works were carried out last year but contractors did not return to do works to trees behind 9 & 10.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Camera not working at bus gate, 18th June
item.description:
Cars are routinely driving - often very fast - through the bus gate at Eleanor Road and Richmond Road. When challenged they tend to say they always use this route and are not being fined. It’s DANGEROUS. Please fix the camera and start making them pay
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eleanor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Clerk And Well Pub, 18th June
item.description:
​To be clear, this public pavement is not a designated pub garden. It is a public thoroughfare meant for pedestrians. Clerk And Well customers should be directed to use actual designated outdoor spaces rather than spilling out onto the public walkway, creating a hazardous bottleneck. ​Today, (18/06/2026) at approximately 18.15pm, I was forced to step off the pavement and walk directly into a busy road to bypass customers. This was necessary to avoid a tight crowd exhibiting loud drunken behavior and to escape breathing in heavy cigarette smoke. Having to step into a live traffic lane is incredibly dangerous and, quite frankly, an accident waiting to happen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 156, Clerkenwell Road, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black paint on road sign, 18th June
item.description:
This is near corner Burney st/Royal hill

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burney Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead

item.title: Dog mess all along the footpaths, 18th June
item.description:
Dog mess all along the road from the beginning to the end of the road at 122 Brantwood way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 112, Brantwood Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People putting bins in road to stop people parking legitimately, 18th June
item.description:
Residents are placing their bins in the road to stop people parking outside their houses ie to reserve “their” space. This is a public road and given that there is a car selling business being operated from one of the houses and therefore there can be several cars on trade plates taking up space on the road, parking is at a premium and it should not be made worse by people thinking that they have a right to the space in front of their house and put bins in the road to stop others parking there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open Manhole, 18th June
item.description:
Open manhole, no work is being done, little protection. Dangerous to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Grove Park, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speeding and illegal use of bus gate, 18th June
item.description:
Speeding at up to 40mph in a 20mph. Went through bus gate on Richmond and Eleanor Road. Claims he can do what he wants and was being vulgar and threatening my pregnant wife and i

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Richmond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
